issue_exact_prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. Drawn on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one clean flat square block with no smaller detail, smooth gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. A single centered Fowl Harvest Equipment item in three-quarter display angle for Threshertooth Blade: an industrial long blade whose toothed edge is a harvested thresher part, with rust-orange teeth, storm-slate spine, and husk-green binding. The subject long side spans about 26–30 logical pixels, with at least two full magenta cells of clearance on every edge. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background, nothing else in frame. Selective one-logical-pixel oil-ink outline. Use only named fowl-harvest-24 colors, 8–12 flat colors maximum. Structural members are at least three logical pixels thick. No Character, duck body, scene, shadow, glow, sparks, particles, text, watermark, UI frame, or transparency.
prompt:
TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. Drawn on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one clean flat square block. A single centered Fowl Harvest Equipment item in three-quarter display angle for Threshertooth Blade: a WIDE industrial long blade (not skinny) whose toothed edge is a harvested thresher part — thick triangular rust-orange teeth along the cutting edge, storm-slate spine, husk-green binding near the grip.

Make the silhouette chunky and wide: long side about 26–30 logical pixels, short side at least ~14–18 logical pixels. At least three full magenta cells clearance on every edge.

COLOR LOCK exact hex:
- spine: storm-slate #55586a
- teeth: rust-orange-deep #bf532f and beak-orange #e47a35
- binding: husk-green #6aa233
- outline: oil-ink #111018
- tiny highlight: diner-cream #f3d897

Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background only. Selective one-logical-pixel oil-ink outline. Structural members ≥3 logical pixels thick. No Character, duck, scene, shadow, glow, sparks, particles, text, watermark, UI frame, or transparency.
note: Unregistered interim Fowl Equipment source family for #394; no registry/runtime activation in this slice.
